entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important crop globally valued for its nutritional and trade properties

entities.name: USA
entities.description: A country where groundnut is grown on large farms with assured inputs and high productivity

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where groundnut is traditionally grown by small-holding farmers in rainfed conditions

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: A leading groundnut producer with high production levels

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output per unit area, which varies based on farming situations and inputs

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: A factor contributing to low groundnut productivity in India

entities.name: POOR SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A factor contributing to low groundnut productivity in India

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Biological agents that negatively impact groundnut productivity in India

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions that negatively impact groundnut productivity in India

entities.name: LOW INPUTS
entities.description: Insufficient agricultural inputs contributing to low productivity in India

entities.name: MARGINAL AND SUBMARGINAL LANDS
entities.description: Low-quality lands used for groundnut cultivation in India

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: Agricultural conditions relying entirely on rainfall for moisture

entities.name: SUMMER MONSOON RAINFALL
entities.description: The primary source of water for rainfed groundnut cultivation in India

entities.name: EARLY SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: A high-probability risk associated with precipitation variability in rainfed agriculture

entities.name: SOWING WINDOW
entities.description: The optimum time period for sowing the crop to maximize yield

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research institution that conducted the study on groundnut production trends and decision support

entities.name: ANANTAPUR REGION
entities.description: The target benchmark region in Andhra Pradesh used for characterizing the production environment

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The Indian state where the Anantapur region is located

entities.name: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM
entities.description: A tool designed to aid farmers in choosing the optimum sowing window based on model simulations and rainfall probabilities

entities.name: PRECISION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An agricultural management approach exemplified by production trends in the USA

entities.name: CROPGRO-PEANUT MODEL
entities.description: A simulation model used to estimate groundnut yield based on weather data

entities.name: HISTORICAL WEATHER DATA
entities.description: Past weather records used as input for yield simulations

entities.name: RAINFALL PROBABILITIES
entities.description: Statistical likelihood of rainfall used to inform the decision support system

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The goal of enhancing and maintaining groundnut productivity over the long term
